defaultContent:

styles: .business-text { padding: 0; margin: 0; height: 100%; } .sbc-metric-left { height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 0 8px 0 0; font-family: 'Segoe UI', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; color: #1E293B; } .sbc-metric-left__head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; min-height: 76px; padding: 0 20px; border: 1px solid #0F5EA8; box-sizing: border-box; } .sbc-metric-left__title { font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 800; color: #0F172A; } .sbc-metric-left__score { font-size: 24px; line-height: 1; font-weight: 800; color: #64748B; white-space: nowrap; } .sbc-metric-left__metrics { margin-top: 18px; padding: 0 18px; } .sbc-metric-left__row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; min-height: 54px; border-bottom: 1px solid #E9EFF6; } .sbc-metric-left__row--alert { border-bottom-color: #F9E0E0; } .sbc-metric-left__label { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; color: #475569; } .sbc-metric-left__row--alert .sbc-metric-left__label { color: #EF4444; font-weight: 700; } .sbc-metric-left__value { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #0F172A; } .sbc-metric-left__row--alert .sbc-metric-left__value { color: #EF4444; }
